news.title: Inspired by the brain, Mizzou researchers build smarter, more efficient computer hardware
news.summary_en: A University of Missouri study shows that small material changes can boost brain-like computing, which could one day help make artificial intelligence more energy-efficient.

news.title: Photo gallery: 2026 Faculty Excellence Week celebrates teaching, research, service
Media Advisory: Mizzou hosts President’s Distinguished Lecture, groundbreaking ceremony for Radioisotope Science Center
news.summary_en: Members of the media may register to attend one or both.

news.title: A University of Missouri and B&B Theatres production: STEM Cinema
news.summary_en: Mizzou partnered with the theater chain to tap into faculty expertise and student creativity to produce educational intros to family-friendly films.

news.title: A legacy of growth: Dean Kristofer Hagglund reflects on 25 years with College of Health Sciences
news.summary_en: Retirement reception will begin at 4 p.m. on May 19 at Clark Hall.

news.title: A look at Mizzou’s 2025 published authors
Less water, same taste: New approach helps growers produce sweet corn more efficiently
news.summary_en: University of Missouri researchers find farmers can cut back on water without losing crop quality.

news.title: Meet a Mizzou Law student ambassador
news.summary_en: As a law school ambassador, Elly Lang DeVeney helps incoming students build connections, find community and feel at home.

news.title: Mizzou veterinarian helps decode animal health
news.summary_en: Lauren Delaney serves as the bridge between veterinarians and the expertise of Mizzou’s Veterinary Medical Diagnostic Laboratory, helping solve complex cases and protect animal health across Missouri and beyond.
